subcodes.first_line: O Lord my God! When I make mention of Thy praise, glorified art Thou! Thou art He through Whose love them that are near have soared in the atmosphere of longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اذکری سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی بحبک طار المقربون فی هوآء شوقک و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
